hd844adc3g7e1cg4763g83cdgcfea5077a9c1: If you want to go poking around in the cellar, be my guest. Plug your nose first though
haeda8379g36c3g4807g8faegf682d02df884: Corpse, half-rotted to mush. Must have been down there a tenday or more.
hd3e577c9ga4a1g4864g861fg54824adb929a: This is a nice place to hole up in. What is it?
he4b53e17g8900g48f7g812dg4d40ec3f49eb: It was a tollhouse. By the time we arrived, it was more like a slaughterhouse.
h5797c0e7gcfbbg496eg8115ga3e396991dab: There's more monsters than coin moving down this road.
h3be610dage9deg4586gbe0agf37747893fe7: Tollhouses mean gold. Seen any around?
h7b2307d5g92ffg4e4eg8adcg9df39f6a1597: There's a locked door down the hatch. Doesn't look like anyone managed to get in.
h3fdecfb0g7ac6g4e4fgacc6g2d703c42ac4e: If there's any gold left, that's where it'll be.
h5d8698adg77d9g4b8eg8619g10e2d4bc0593: Try anything, and I'll cut your belly open.
ha9efc493gc2f3g4a42ga703gef5c2c09659b: You can relax - this place is under Tyr's protection.
